completed_tasks.name: Align RFQ, quotation, client, and SO form rules
Make create output appear without browser refresh

decisions.decision: RFQ create/edit does not use document numbers
decisions.rationale: RFQ is the client request/specification stage; numbering belongs to quotation/SO flows.
NP is not New Product and must not be connected to RFQ numbering.

decisions.decision: SO number belongs only to Sales Order
decisions.rationale: Quotation create should not ask for SO because SO is created after PO/order.

decisions.decision: Realtime-for-own-input is handled by React Query cache updates after successful create
decisions.rationale: The user requirement was no browser refresh after input; updating exact list caches gives immediate UI output while invalidateQueries keeps server data synchronized.

next_action: If the user reports another stale list after create/edit, inspect the mutation path and ensure the exact query key displayed by that route is updated or invalidated.
context_notes: Repo is on main at 9992ab3 pushed to origin/main. Current worktree was clean before this handoff file was created.
